name: John Doe
history: Recurrent stomachaches and physical symptoms associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties involving weight management, sexuality, and academic performance. Reports a transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't be perfect, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of commitment and self-sabotage in personal and professional areas.
situation: Concern about losing positive aspects of life or returning to a previous unhappy state.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right, so why try?
behavior: Procrastination, avoidance of responsibilities, and reluctance to engage in meaningful relationships.
